parameters.query:
SELECT
  o.id,
  o.code,
  o.customer_phone,
  o.status,
  o.order_type,
  o.notified_status,
  COALESCE(c.name, 'cliente') AS customer_name,
  osn.message_template,
  (SELECT value FROM settings WHERE key = 'evolution_api_key') AS evolution_api_key
FROM orders o
LEFT JOIN customers c ON c.phone = o.customer_phone
JOIN order_status_notifications osn
  ON osn.status = o.status AND osn.enabled = true
WHERE o.deleted_at IS NULL
  AND (o.notified_status IS NULL OR o.notified_status <> o.status)
ORDER BY o.updated_at DESC
LIMIT 50
UPDATE orders SET notified_status = '{{ $json.status }}', updated_at = now() WHERE id = '{{ $json.id }}'
